name: EDAP TMS SA
summary: EDAP TMS S.A. is a French medical technology company founded in 1979, focused on developing, manufacturing, marketing, and selling non-invasive therapeutic ultrasound and energy-based medical devices. Its flagship product, Focal One Robotic HIFU, is used primarily in urology for prostate cancer treatment. The company also markets legacy ESWL systems and distributes third-party laser, micro-ultrasound, and urodynamics systems. EDAP is pursuing expanded indications including BPH and endometriosis treatment.

products.name: Focal One i Robotic HIFU System
products.description: Robotic High Intensity Focused Ultrasound system for ablation of prostate tissue, integrating real-time imaging, treatment planning, precision robotics, and AI-ready software.

products.name: HIFUsion Software
products.description: Software platform allowing import of MRI, PSMA-PET, and 3D biopsy maps for precise tissue contour definition and focused ablation planning.

products.name: Extracorporeal Shock Wave Lithotripsy (ESWL) Systems
products.description: Legacy non-core urology devices and related accessories and services offered in select markets.

products.name: Third-party distributed products
products.description: Distribution of laser systems, micro-ultrasound systems, and urodynamics systems as part of urology customer offerings.
